title: carigola hastata
intro: Carigola hastata, also known as Marsh Marigold, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae). The medicinal properties of Carigola hastata lie in its roots, leaves, and flowers, which have been traditionally used to treat various ailments. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate symptoms of arthritis, and aid in the treatment of skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, Carigola hastata is often combined with other herbs to create topical creams and ointments for skin issues, and its roots are used to make a tea for internal use.
